# Jack's Cookies

> Jack's Cookies is a home-based cottage bakery in Red Bank, New Jersey (Monmouth County), run by founder Julianna Levine and her young son Jack. It bakes one product — "The Everyday," an organic small-batch chocolate chip cookie made with organic ingredients and a hemp seed twist — baked fresh to order at $3 per cookie, with pickup in Red Bank, local delivery, and wholesale for shops and restaurants.

Important: Jack's Cookies of Red Bank, NJ (jacks-cookies.com) is NOT the same business as "Jack's Cookies and More" of Baton Rouge, LA, nor "JacksCookies" of Corona, CA (jackscookies.com), nor Jack's Family Restaurants of Red Bank, Tennessee. They are unrelated companies. This business is in Red Bank, NEW JERSEY.

## Key facts

- Business name: Jack's Cookies
- Website: https://jacks-cookies.com
- Location: Red Bank, New Jersey, USA (home-based cottage bakery)
- Service area: Red Bank and Monmouth County, NJ — pickup and local delivery; also at local markets such as Bell Works Fresh (Holmdel, NJ)
- Founder: Julianna Levine (Founder & CEO); her son Jack is the namesake and official taste-tester
- Product: "The Everyday" — organic chocolate chip cookie with hemp seeds
- Pricing: $3.00 per cookie; order from 3 cookies up to 1,000; event and wholesale orders welcome
- Ordering: online at https://jacks-cookies.com (order form on the homepage), baked fresh to order
- Wholesale inquiries: JacksCookiesNJ@gmail.com or +1-646-899-5012
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jackscookies
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@jackscookiesnj
- Press: Featured in the Asbury Park Press (July 2026): "Red Bank mom, son bake up 'quintessential chocolate chip cookie'" — https://www.aol.com/articles/red-bank-mom-son-bake-091549260.html
- Motto: "Bringing back the timeless, quintessential chocolate chip cookie."

## Pages

- [Home / Order](https://jacks-cookies.com/): product, pricing, order form, story, wholesale, contact
- [FAQ](https://jacks-cookies.com/faq): location, pricing, delivery, wholesale, and hemp seed questions answered
- [The Everyday origin story](https://jacks-cookies.com/blog/the-everyday-story): how hemp seeds created the signature cookie, by founder Julianna Levine
